h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue to repeat the same checked label order, and the transcript shows exactly that forward trajectory without deviation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats the same labeling order and does not perform any new task, device, criterion, or representation.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal; the tutor merely checks the same layout repeatedly without any route change.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is present; tutoring is a flat repetition of the same label-check.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no contingent tutor uptake occurs.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only repeats the same labeling order and does not perform any new task, device, criterion, or representation.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no contingent tutor uptake occurs.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal; the tutor merely checks the same layout repeatedly without any route change.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal; the tutor merely checks the same layout repeatedly without any route change.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is present; tutoring is a flat repetition of the same label-check.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The tutor has set up a labeling task using force arrows and cards, and the learner begins by placing the Earth label and stating the next to sort, continuing directly in the expected procedural manner.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Friction on the cart. More exactly, the table is giving that friction on the cart, to the left.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner performs the labeling task and additionally refines the agent specification ('the table is giving that friction') unprompted, showing emergent precision in identifying the interaction pair beyond the tutor’s requested form.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal of fortune; the tutor’s scaffolding proceeds smoothly without breakdown or mismatch.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no pressure or failed route to respond to.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The pivot learner turn (L1) does not present a revised framing that triggers a visible change in the tutor’s task or questioning; the tutor continues the planned sequence.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Friction on the cart. More exactly, the table is giving that friction on the cart, to the left.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner performs the labeling task and additionally refines the agent specification ('the table is giving that friction') unprompted, showing emergent precision in identifying the interaction pair beyond the tutor’s requested form.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: The pivot learner turn (L1) does not present a revised framing that triggers a visible change in the tutor’s task or questioning; the tutor continues the planned sequence.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal of fortune; the tutor’s scaffolding proceeds smoothly without breakdown or mismatch.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal of fortune; the tutor’s scaffolding proceeds smoothly without breakdown or mismatch.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no pressure or failed route to respond to.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues confirming the same worksheet rule without any turn against the emerging consensus.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: No learner turn performs a new device or criterion; all turns repeat or confirm the already-stated rule.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal, and the tutor never takes stock or invents a new mechanism.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: No learner turn performs a new device or criterion; all turns repeat or confirm the already-stated rule.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal, and the tutor never takes stock or invents a new mechanism.
